title: Client Necessities
description: A heavily optimized modpack with a small, but handy set of essential QoL mods
body:
![Client Necessities logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f27433279b194230dc26e70fa45a60fcd2955e8e.png)
‎ 

### You've just stumbled upon a modpack that has been carefully polished by a perfectionist.
### A lot of effort has been used here to offer the most delightful experience right off the bat!
‎ 

This modpack is built on top of the [Latency Nullifier](https://modrinth.com/modpack/latency-nullifier) modpack, so except top-tier performance. Along with that, the modpack includes all the essential every-day utility features many of us have grown used to having. And as a bonus, many of the mods are also pre-configured for your convenience.

This modpack is for you if you're looking for an optimized minimal ready-to-play experience with only the basic quality-of-life enhancements and no extra fluff. Or if you want a lightweight and easy preconfigured modpack as a template for your other modpacks. Whatever works for you!
‎ 

## The Highlights of this modpack:
- 💡 Dynamic lights
- 🌅 Shader support
- 🔎 Zoom ability
- 🚀 Optimizations
- ⚡ Instant world quitting
- 📸 Copy screenshots automatically to the clipboard
- 🔁 Ability to sync keybinds, resourcepacks, saves, etc across your modpacks

‎ 
<details>
<summary>⚡ Various optimizations</summary>

- Optimized Achievements
- Optimized Chunk loading performance
- Optimized Boot times
- Patched various Minecraft bugs
- Faster block entity rendering
- Block and Entity culling
- Fast animation and Random function calculations
- Fixed VRAM and RAM leaks
- More efficient memory utilization
- Optimized immediate mode rendering engine
- Optimized Minecraft's networking stack
- Optimized game physics, mob AI, and block ticking
- Optimized Lighting engine
- Entity Ticking optimizations
- GPU Utilization for chunk rendering
- Optimized particle rendering
- Optimized game stuttering when under load
- Improved thread scheduling
- Nether portals function faster
- Made the serverlist perform faster
- Faster world load times
- Updated OpenGL version
- Multithreaded entity calculations
- Entry deduplications

</details>


<details>
<summary>📑 Extra Info</summary>

## 

**This modpack uses Fabric Loader by default, but if you prefer to use Quilt, then you can just simply drag all of the mods and configs to a Quilt instance, and it would just work.**

## 

**🟨 = 1.21.4 versions**

**🟦 = 1.21.1 versions**

**◻️ = 1.20.1 versions** 

</details>



‎ 
> 🚀 If you're looking for the absolute minimal experience with only optimizations, check out [this](https://modrinth.com/modpack/latency-nullifier)

> 🪄 For advanced users, I have a modpack with **all of the essential utilities** [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/azura-client-essentials)
